Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Doctor Cryce]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — Doctor Cryce provides bio-readings and medical information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 7''' — Doctor Cryce communicates via audio implant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Doctor Cryce is a character who interacts with Jan and Kyri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — Doctor Cryce is a character who manages the infrastructure at the Titan Forge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — Doctor Cryce is a master Aether Technician.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — Doctor Cryce invented and built the Divine Titans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — Doctor Cryce has green eyes that glow in the dark.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — Doctor Cryce's hair is solid gray.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — Doctor Cryce's gifts are not applicable to biological modification.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Doctor Cryce is Parryl's aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Doctor Cryce is a medical professional.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Doctor Cryce has Technician gifts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Doctor Cryce has an ocular implant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Doctor Cryce uses a wrist console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Doctor Cryce uses a tablet console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — Doctor Cryce is a person the narrator knows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Doctor Cryce is a doctor located on the moon of Titan Force headquarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Doctor Cryce is a woman who has trust in Raion.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Raion is tasked to help Doctor Cryce.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Doctor Cryce repaired the Red Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 18''' — Doctor Cryce is a doctor who warns about the limitations of their drone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Doctor Cryce is a person the Captain requests.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 46''' — Doctor Cryce managed to make the Red Divine Titan functional.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
